project.name: ECU Simulator
project.description: Production-grade ECU diagnostic platform supporting KWP2000/ISO9141 with hybrid transport (TCP for dev/CI, K-Line serial for hardware-in-loop)

objectives: Provide virtual ECU for diagnostic protocol development and testing
Support KWP2000 (ISO 14230) and ISO9141 communication protocols
Enable hardware-in-loop (HIL) testing with real K-Line hardware
Simulate realistic ECU timing (P1/P2/P3/P4) and response behaviors
Inject faults (DTC, sensor, timing, protocol) for testing diagnostic tools
Provide multiple transport layers (TCP, Serial, WebSocket) for flexibility
Include DTC engine compliant with SAE J2012/ISO 15031-6
keyComponents: KWP2000 protocol router and service handler
